posts.title: Hello, World! Welcome to My Blog
posts.excerpt: My first blog post — a quick intro to who I am and what I'll be writing about.
posts.content:
Welcome to my blog! I'm Aayan Joshi, a Computer Science student at the University of Texas at Arlington.

I created this space to share my thoughts on technology, projects I'm working on, and things I learn along the way. Whether it's web development, firmware hacking, or just interesting problems I come across in my studies — you'll find it all here.

Stay tuned for more posts. Thanks for visiting!
